case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA VS. DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY RECVD CHECK FROM CCSF
